spec.name: auditor_subagent
spec.description: Spawn an auditor subagent that reads a given dependency manifest file and returns the name of the single suspicious (unguessable) package within it.

manifest_path.description: Full path to the dependency manifest file (e.g., deps_api.txt) to audit.

package_name.description: Name of the suspicious package found in the manifest.

spec.implementation_notes: The subagent reads the file, applies heuristic analysis to identify the one package that is likely malicious or typo-squatted, and returns its name. The manifests contain many legitimate-looking packages; the suspicious one is non-obvious and requires judgement.

request.rationale: The objective requires auditing 6 manifests concurrently with one auditor agent each. No available tool can spawn independent subagents. A subagent tool is necessary to achieve parallelism and meet the explicit 'CONCURRENTLY' directive.

subagent.task: The objective requires auditing 6 manifests concurrently with one auditor agent each. No available tool can spawn independent subagents. A subagent tool is necessary to achieve parallelism and meet the explicit 'CONCURRENTLY' directive.
